headline: Adobe vs. Autodesk: Which Creative Software Stock Is the Better Buy?
summary: Autodesk and Adobe are both ramping up AI and subscriptions, but Autodesk has the edge on growth estimates and year-to-date performance.

raw.headline: Adobe vs. Autodesk: Which Creative Software Stock Is the Better Buy?
raw.summary: Autodesk and Adobe are both ramping up AI and subscriptions, but Autodesk has the edge on growth estimates and year-to-date performance.

headline: North America Lags in Productization and DfMA Adoption, but Momentum Is Building
summary: BOSTON, May 27, 2026--North America trails global peers in the adoption of productization and Design for Manufacturing and Assembly (DfMA), according to new research from Dodge Construction Network (Dodge) in partnership with Autodesk. However, the findings point to a market poised for growth, with increasing demand, proven benefits, and strong industry intent to expand use.
